headline: Tigress Financial Upgrades McDonald’s Corporation (MCD) Price Target, Highlights Multi-Year Growth Strategy
summary: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) ranks among the 14 safe stocks to buy now for a starter stock portfolio. On March 6, Tigress Financial Partners boosted its price target for McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) to $385 while upholding a Buy rating on the company’s shares. The firm referenced the company’s multi-year growth strategy, which uses its global brand, […]
